import React from 'react'; import { ArrowLeft, ExternalLink, User, Tag, Calendar, Globe, Award, ShieldCheck } from 'lucide-react'; function ProjectDetails({ project, onBack }) { if (!project) return (

Loading project details...

); return (
{/* 🎨 Fixed Glass Navbar */}
Verified NIMIT Project
{/* 🎨 Layout Grid */}
{/* 🖼️ LEFT: Visuals & Description (8 Cols) */}
{project.imageUrl ? ( ) : (

No Preview Available

)}

Executive Summary

{project.description}

{/* 📊 RIGHT: Project Meta (4 Cols) */}
{project.category}

{project.title}

Developer

{project.authorName || 'NIMIT Student'}

Submission

{project.createdAt?.seconds ? new Date(project.createdAt.seconds * 1000).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }) : 'Feb 2026'}

{/* 🚀 CALL TO ACTION: LIVE DEMO */} {project.liveDemoUrl && ( Launch Live App )}

Repository ID: {project.id.substring(0,12)}

); } export default ProjectDetails;
